title: Manual/auto recipe state and production canvas overlay integration
acceptanceTarget: One Slice grid controller owns auto/manual state, emits an exact deterministic GridSplitRecipeV1 draft, preserves the manual choice, follows host undo/save/load, and renders its effective layout through the real source-canvas viewport without a second store.

architecture.overlayMount: absolute sibling of data-studio-source-canvas inside the same measured container
architecture.hostPersistence: single optional ProjectState.sliceGrid key, version 1; same undo/save/load transaction as the existing mounted host
architecture.canonicalBoundary: The persisted value is a transitional GridSplitRecipeV1 draft plus UI-only manual memory. It is not a canonical ProcessingRecipe record and has no fake id/timestamps. G6 binds its sourceAssetId to the canonical AssetRepository record when committing regions/assets.
architecture.sourceReset: resetSliceSourceProjectState removes the complete sliceGrid key atomically
architecture.oldProjectMigration: valid missing state initializes ephemerally without creating an undo step; malformed state fails closed to defaults

focusedTests.result: 11 files, 44 tests passed; zero React act or console warnings

metrics.invalidDraftRetained: rows=0 visible while recipe and overlay remain 3x2/6

productionBrowser.visualInspection: passed: focused desktop Studio screenshot shows only the canonical Manual 3x2 overlay over the 2x4 source fixture, with no legacy 2x2 grid underneath and no drawer/toast obstruction

legacyRegression.result: real preview Worker lifecycle, cancellation, compact drawer, focus, source ownership and zero-error matrix passed

scopedLint.command: bunx oxlint components/canvas/CanvasArea.tsx components/layout/AppLayout.tsx features/slice/grid/gridRecipeState.ts features/slice/grid/useSliceGridController.ts features/slice/grid/SliceGridInspector.tsx features/slice/grid/SliceGridOverlay.tsx features/slice/grid/index.ts hooks/canvas/canvasOwnership.ts hooks/canvas/useCanvasMouse.ts hooks/canvas/useCanvasRenderLoop.ts hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts hooks/useProjectController.ts types/core.ts utils/renderUtils.ts tests/components/sliceGridInspector.test.tsx tests/contract/gridRecipeState.test.ts tests/contract/canvasGridOwnership.test.ts tests/hooks/useSliceGridIntegration.test.tsx tests/hooks/useCanvasMouseCanonical.test.tsx tests/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.test.ts tests/hooks/useProjectControllerSliceSource.test.tsx scripts/studio-grid-integration-browser.mjs --deny-warnings

independentReview.finalEvidence: Independent final review accepted 44/44 focused tests, global typecheck, strict lint and production build. It revalidated single ownership across render, mouse, keyboard, export, source dimensions, persistence hydration, canonical workspace quarantine and late background preview/apply cancellation.
repairs: Canonical Slice renderer now draws the source once and does not execute builderGrid, active grid, frame or pixel-grid consumers.
AppLayout passes persisted state as unknown and never dereferences recipe before descriptor-safe hydration.
Truthy malformed persisted drafts are replaced ephemerally with validated defaults before save, without a user edit or undo step.
Chrome instrumentation records source-canvas legacy stroke/strokeRect count 0 and real overlay draw count greater than 0.
Hook tests await async effects and assert zero console/React act warnings.
Canonical Slice passes a null legacy interaction bundle, leaving only shared pan/zoom active; click, drag/drop, selection, eyedropper and mutation callbacks are unreachable.
AppLayout gates legacy Delete and Arrow-key nudge while Slice owns the workspace.
The Export workspace retains canonical Slice ownership and renders/exports a deterministic source-only PNG; G7 owns grid-aware region/sheet export.
Chrome saves the project before and after mixed mouse/drop/keyboard input and proves byte-equivalent project state plus the expected recipe undo step.
Chrome instruments every offscreen canvas and proves one canonical drawImage, zero canonical grid strokes and zero unowned offscreen grid strokes.
One canonicalCanvasOwnership flag now controls CanvasArea interaction, renderer, export and AppLayout keyboard routing in both Slice and source-only Export.
Legacy animation/editor keyboard mutations are disabled at the shortcut owner while canonical canvas ownership is active; global registry commands remain available.
One resolveCanvasContentDimensions policy feeds visible render, viewport reset and snapshot export; source intrinsic/image metadata wins over a conflicting builder canvas under canonical ownership.

Production Chrome loads source 400x200 with builder 1024x1024, proves visible draw and overlay remain 400x200, decodes the PNG as 400x200, and proves Export Arrow/Delete leave the project unchanged after navigation clears legacy selection.

The canonical workspace transition boundary now clears selection, playback, eyedropper, magic-wand and preview state before command navigation, plus an effect fallback covers hash/back transitions where AppMode does not change.
useCanvasMouse drops any in-flight legacy drag/hover/drop state when its legacy interaction bundle becomes null; returning to a legacy workspace cannot resurrect it.
Chrome selects a legacy Compose frame, enters same-AppMode Slice, proves selectedIndex none and project byte-equivalent, then returns to Compose and proves the selection stays cleared.

Background preview/apply now share an AbortController generation owned by ProjectController; canonical transitions abort pending work, revoke active/late Blob URLs, clear loading state and prevent delayed setProject writes.
Workspace-keyed sidebars reset BgRemovalTool local live state, while a hook regression resolves preview/apply after quarantine and proves source byte-equivalence, preview null and zero late URLs.

hostileMatrix.invalidManualDraft: visible locally; durable recipe not mutated
hostileMatrix.sourceGenerationRace: existing AbortController and operation generation gate retained
hostileMatrix.passiveWheelFailure: repaired with an owned passive:false native listener and cleanup
hostileMatrix.mixedGridConsumers: canonical Slice source renderer bypasses legacy builderGrid/gridConfig/frames/pixel-grid execution; other workspaces retain the default renderer path
hostileMatrix.mixedLegacyInteractions: canonical Slice supplies no legacy interaction bundle; project serialization is identical before/after left-click drag, file drop, ArrowRight and Delete; undo still targets the prior grid recipe
hostileMatrix.canonicalOffscreenExport: source-only PNG is 2628 bytes, decodes as 400x200, and has exactly one drawImage, zero canonical strokes and zero unowned offscreen strokes
hostileMatrix.conflictingDimensions: source metadata/intrinsic 400x200 remains authoritative for visible render, overlay, viewport and export when legacy builderCanvas is 1024x1024
hostileMatrix.canonicalExportKeyboard: Compose selection is cleared on Export transition; hostile non-null mutation callbacks are inert in hook tests and Arrow/Delete leave the serialized project unchanged in Chrome
hostileMatrix.canonicalWorkspaceTransition: Compose selection plus legacy eyedropper/wand/playback/drag state is quarantined on canonical ownership even when Compose and Slice share AppMode.BUILDER; project state is unchanged and legacy return does not resurrect selection
hostileMatrix.lateBackgroundOperations: preview/apply use an owned AbortController generation; transition aborts work, revokes active or late Blob URLs, clears loading and prevents delayed project mutation

qualityLoops: 1 | inspected mounted controller, source lifecycle and CanvasArea viewport seam | selected one-controller/no-store route | better
2 | exact recipe contract lacked manual memory | added versioned wrapper with exact GridSplitRecipeV1 | better
3 | persisted input could execute getters or carry contradictory data | added descriptor-safe fail-closed hydration | better
4 | old host had no canonical ProjectStore mount | adapted one transitional ProjectState key with explicit boundary | better
5 | invalid edits could diverge UI and durable state | valid-only commit transaction and retained invalid text | better
6 | external undo/load could leave controller stale | persisted-state reconciliation and generation reset | better
7 | overlay existed only as a standalone seam | mounted effectiveLayout beside real source canvas | better
8 | production ctrl-wheel emitted a passive-listener browser error | native passive:false listener with cleanup | better
9 | runtime claims lacked integrated proof | real import/manual/invalid/undo/redo/save/load/pan/zoom/DPR/drawer journey | better
10 | compact visual and diagnostics could still regress | screenshot inspection plus zero-error gate | better

11 | canonical visual ownership still left invisible legacy input consumers alive | replaced mixed dependencies with an explicit nullable legacy interaction bundle and gated keyboard mutations | better
12 | export navigation remounted CanvasArea without canonical ownership | carried source-only ownership into Export workspace and blocked legacy frame export | better
13 | source-only and interaction claims needed production evidence | instrumented project snapshots, undo, every canvas draw path and downloaded PNG in Chrome | better
14 | workspace-string keyboard gates missed source-only Export | routed all legacy editor/animation shortcuts through canonical canvas ownership | better

15 | builder dimensions still preceded the canonical source | centralized content dimensions and proved 400x200 source over conflicting 1024x1024 builder across render, viewport, overlay and decoded export | better

16 | Compose to Slice shared AppMode and bypassed mode-level selection clearing | added canonical workspace transition quarantine plus drag reset and proved no project mutation or selection resurrection | better

17 | async legacy background work could resolve after canonical transition | added abort generation, URL ownership cleanup, late-write guards and workspace-keyed local-state reset; 44/44 focused tests | stop

adversarialAutopsy.strongestObjection: The mounted legacy host cannot yet supply an AssetRepository-backed source ID, so the transitional draft ID is processing-valid but must not be mistaken for a committed ProcessingRecipe reference.
adversarialAutopsy.userHarm: Committing it directly into StudioProjectV1 before G6 source binding could create a dangling asset reference.
adversarialAutopsy.repair: The bridge is explicitly typed/documented as a draft, never creates ProcessingRecipe id/timestamps, and reset removes it. G6 must replace sourceAssetId with the canonical source AssetRecord before regions.commitRecipe.
adversarialAutopsy.closingProof: G6 integration test must process -> bind source asset -> commit -> save/reload -> undo with project validation green.
adversarialAutopsy.remainingSeverity: P2 deferred to G6; it does not invalidate G2 worker/control/overlay recipe determinism
